pr.title: 11L + XSA4 + EMA(0.997) + seq2048 + Int5-MLP + MuonWD=0.04 + LateK-FP16 | val_bpb=1.1361

output.summary: 11-layer U-Net transformer adds Int5/Int6 quantization plus Late-K FP16 and XSA on deepest layers, seq2048 training with EMA and tuned Muon decay.
techniques: Per-row Int6 attention + Int5 MLP quantization with Late-K FP16 key
Exclusive Self-Attention on the last four layers
Seq2048 updates with EMA(0.997) and tuned Muon weight decay
